set_fields.acceptance_criteria: Each autoresearch task uses an isolated checkout separate from the main workspace, persisted state records checkout path/task branch/phase base commit, keep commits only on the isolated branch, non-keep cleanup affects only the isolated checkout, ambiguous cleanup enters explicit blocked/manual-resolution state with recovery metadata, accepted changes do not implicitly sync into the main workspace, tests cover keep/discard/crash/checks_failed/blocked cases, and extensions/tau gate passes.
